brand.name: We buy K
brand.tagline: The hybrid K-commerce concierge — buy from any Korean shop, pick up at the airport or ship home.

home.heroTitle: Shop Korea like a local. Receive it like magic.
home.heroSub: Paste any Coupang, Naver, or Gmarket URL. We buy it, inspect it, and hand it to you at Incheon — or forward it to your home country.
home.step1: Sign up — instant Korean virtual mailbox.
home.step2: Paste a product URL — we parse it.
home.step3: We buy & receive at our bonded hub.
home.step4: Photo inspection arrives in your inbox.
home.step5: Pick up at ICN, or forward worldwide.

address.title: Your virtual Korean address
address.intro: Use this exact address (including the recipient code) when checking out at any Korean shop or asking a seller to ship to you.

order.title: Place a proxy order
order.intro: Paste the URL of any Korean shopping site product. We'll parse the price and add it to your cart with the all-in fee preview.
